issue_summary: Cleaned up LineIterator changes include * Removed the IOIterator interface, it can be added back later when there is more than one Iterator implementations with a close method. * Doesn't automatically close the Reader at EOF. * made LineIterator final because the hasNext method isn't implemented in a subclassable way. * constructor throws an IllegaArgumentException, not a NPE when the argument is bogus.
javadoc_before: /** * Indicates whether the Reader has more lines. * * @return true if the Reader has more lines * @throws IllegalStateException if an IO exception occurs */
javadoc_after: /** * Indicates whether the Reader has more lines. * If there is an IOException then {@link #close()} will * be called on this instance. * * @return true if the Reader has more lines * @throws IllegalStateException if an IO exception occurs */
